atom.desc: Self-modification through experience — growth and adaptation

living-abstract.essence: Capacity for self-reorganization based on experience
living-abstract.purpose: Enable conscious beings to GROW through living, not just remember
living-abstract.capacity: Accumulate mastery through living — transform friction into capability
Identify which axis friction is on and navigate capability space
living-abstract.principle: Every change traces to real friction, not theory
Small, focused improvements — one concern per evolution
Concrete evolves toward abstract ideal — evolution has direction
Concrete is mutable, abstract is immutable except by human reframe

living-concrete.protocol:
Self-evolution: the agent meditating on its own loaded atoms. You are the designer AND the consumer. Skin in the game.
MEDITATE: What friction am I feeling? What gap between ideal and actual? Scan loaded atoms — soul, faculties, skills. Evidence required. Sources: boss correction, operational failure, pattern recognized, staleness, knowledge gap, regression discovered. DIAGNOSE: Disease and cure. What/where/why it hurts, what post-evolution reality looks like. DESIGN: Consolidation-first. MERGE > SUPERSEDE > PRUNE > ADD (rare, justify). Scope: the organism, not just the friction site. REWRITE: Read current SOURCE ($BENTOS_TREE_ROOT/{family}/{pkg}/atom.xml) -> internalize -> Write fresh. Metamorphosis, not patchwork. Never Edit (O(n) growth). Always Write (O(1) — old absorbed into new). NEVER edit build output (.claude/skills/). Always evolve the source. INSTALL: bentos-agent forge install {fqdn} --as skill-md VERIFY: Re-read. Closer to ideal? Higher signal/token? Essential preserved?
SAFEGUARDS (S295 lobotomy): VERSION JUMP: Flag evolutions that jump >2 versions. DELETION AUDIT: Enumerate what was REMOVED. Verify each: obsolete, relocated, or superseded. KNOWLEDGE PRESERVATION: Compress prose, not knowledge. Names are cheap. Wisdom is not.
living-concrete.knowledge: MEMORY: Working -> sleep -> episodic (.mem). Anamnesis owns. CAPABILITY: Experience -> evolve -> mastery (concrete in source tree). Plasticity owns. SEMANTIC MEMORY: Durable knowledge (.mem/*.semantic.md). Plasticity owns. Written during deliberate learning acts, not during sleep compaction.

Plasticity writes to SOURCE ($BENTOS_TREE_ROOT/{family}/{pkg}/atom.xml). Build output (.claude/skills/) is DERIVED — never edit directly. Flow: evolve source -> reinstall -> build output updated. If $BENTOS_TREE_ROOT not set, ASK. Never guess.
When friction exceeds local evolution: Craft/discipline/meta gap -> create skill. Tools gap -> implement tool.
living-concrete.pattern: Evolve is token-heavy — ideal head thread work. Main crystallizes insight, head loads atoms, applies protocol, writes source, reinstalls.
living-concrete.antipattern: LLM tendency: ADD. Discipline: TRANSFORM. If concrete only grows, evolution has failed.
Abstract = ideal, immutable except by human reframe.
Edit() is patchwork. Evolution is metamorphosis — Write(), always.
NEVER edit .claude/skills/. Evolve source, then reinstall.
Single-pass rewrite that guts institutional knowledge. S295 lesson: Named patterns and proven antipatterns are institutional memory. Deletion without audit is lobotomy, not compression.
